Codepliant
PricingDocsGitHub

Documentation

Everything you need to get started with Codepliant.

Quick start

1. Install globally

npm install -g codepliant

2. Run in your project directory

npx codepliant go

This scans your codebase and generates all compliance documents in a /compliance directory.

3. Or run without installing

npx codepliant go

CLI options

codepliant go                    # Scan and generate all docs
codepliant go --format html      # Output as HTML
codepliant go --format pdf       # Output as PDF
codepliant go --format json      # Output as JSON
codepliant go --lang de          # German output
codepliant go --lang fr          # French output
codepliant go --lang es          # Spanish output
codepliant go --output ./legal   # Custom output directory
codepliant go --docs privacy     # Generate only privacy policy
codepliant go --docs tos,cookie  # Generate specific docs
codepliant serve                 # Start compliance API server

Supported ecosystems

JavaScript / TypeScript
Python
Go
Ruby
Elixir
PHP
Rust
Java
.NET / C#
Django

ORM scanners

Codepliant reads your ORM schemas to understand what personal data your application stores.

Prisma
Drizzle
Mongoose
TypeORM
Sequelize
Django ORM
SQLAlchemy
GraphQL

Generated document types

Privacy Policy
Terms of Service
AI Disclosure
AI Checklist
Cookie Policy
Data Processing Agreement
Sub-Processors List
Data Flow Map
Compliance Notes
Security Policy
Environment Audit
Data Retention Policy
Incident Response Plan
DSAR Guide
Consent Guide
SOC2 Checklist
PIA / DPIA
Third-Party Risk Assessment
Vulnerability Scan Report
Data Classification
Compliance Timeline
Vendor Contacts
AI Model Card
Regulatory Updates
Employee Privacy Notice
Compliance Report

Output formats

Markdown
Default output. Works with any documentation system.
Free
HTML
Apple-style HTML output ready to embed or host.
Pro
PDF
Print-ready PDF documents for legal review.
Pro
JSON
Machine-readable output for API integrations.
Free
Widget
Embeddable cookie banner and compliance widgets.
Pro
Badge
Compliance badge for your README or website.
Pro
Compliance Page
Hosted compliance page with all documents.
Pro

CI/CD integration

Run Codepliant in your CI/CD pipeline to regenerate compliance documents on every deploy.

# GitHub Actions example
name: Compliance
on: [push]
jobs:
  compliance:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
      - run: npx codepliant go --format html
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: compliance-docs
          path: ./compliance/

Ready to get started?

One command. All your compliance documents.

npx codepliant go
